title: Composio Connected Account
description: Represents an authenticated connection between an end user and a third-party application, managed through Composio's OAuth flow.

id.description: Unique identifier for the connected account.

toolkit.description: The toolkit (application) this account is connected to.

entityId.description: Identifier for the end user entity that owns this connection.

authConfigId.description: The auth configuration used for this connection.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the connected account was created.
